critic.verdict: A pristine casual chart with perfect grid alignment, smooth lane sweeping, and excellent physical playability.

issues.problem: The 1-beat transition from GAP to BAR (9.03s to 9.495s) introduces a sudden rhythm speed-up compared to the surrounding 2-beat pacing, which might catch casual players off guard.
The transition from the drop to the outro has an abrupt 3-beat gap (12.28s to 13.68s) that briefly disrupts the established steady physical pulse of the song.

design_notes: For the intro, we establish a steady half-note pace, introducing the center-lane hold that represents the low-end drone. We resolve the momentum-killing gap right before the drop by keeping beats 15, 17, 19, and 20 active, creating a clean transition. In the drop, we fix the empty climax issue by keeping a rhythmic, engaging half-note groove with mirrored and answered phrases to avoid boring stairs or repetitive lane patterns. Finally, the outro eases off the tension, winding down into a sparse pattern.

design_sections.name: S0
design_sections.intent: Establish the groove and build momentum up to the drop.

design_sections.name: S1
design_sections.intent: Drive peak energy at the drop entry with clean transitions.

design_sections.name: S2
design_sections.intent: Maintain the peak energy of the main drop with balanced lane-switching patterns.

design_sections.name: S3
design_sections.intent: Wind down the chart, providing a satisfying breathing space.
